message:
fix(undo): prevent empty string in alternativeHypothesisIds

Fixed two bugs in set_primary_hypothesis command handling:
1. applyCommand: If no previous primary exists, don't add empty string to alternatives
2. reverseCommand: Same fix for undo path

Also improved createEvidenceCommand to only add "..." suffix when truncating,
and show "(empty)" for missing observation.

Added test for edge case: setting primary when no previous primary exists.
